EventDescriptions.EventDescription: {protocol.layer7} connection from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was opened on host {event_src.host}
{protocol.layer7} connection from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was denied by the rule "{subject.name}" on host {event_src.host}
{protocol.layer7} connection from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} was closed on host {event_src.host}
